channel.title: Disaster-Recovery on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Disaster-Recovery on ivomarino.com

item.title: Production Backup Strategy: Three Layers of Defense
item.description: Single backup tool doesn’t work at production scale. Learn the three-layer backup architecture combining ZFS snapshots (local fast recovery), Restic backups (offsite immutable), and S3 archives (compliance). Achieves defense-in-depth with 1TB data, point-in-time recovery, and only $50/month cost.
